stories.title: FIFA Sets Record $871M Prize Pool for World Cup 2026
stories.desc: FIFA has announced a record total prize fund of $871 million for the FIFA World Cup 2026, marking the largest financial allocation in the history of the global football competition.

stories.title: Panini Launches Largest Ever World Cup Sticker Album
stories.desc: Panini officially launched its 2026 FIFA World Cup sticker album on April 28 at Wembley Stadium, featuring a record 980 stickers including 68 special editions and a Coca-Cola partnership with 12 exclusive stickers.

stories.title: Extreme Heat Could Threaten Players and Fans at 2026 World Cup
stories.desc: With the 2026 FIFA World Cup kicking off in June, researchers are warning that rising temperatures could pose a threat to both players and fans during the tournament.

stories.title: USMNT to Reveal 26-Player Roster on May 26 in NYC
stories.desc: U.S. Soccer confirmed that the USMNT will officially unveil its 26-player World Cup roster on May 26 in New York City during a live fan event at The Rooftop at Pier 17, airing nationally on FOX at 3 p.m. ET.

stories.title: Brazil's Eder Militao Ruled Out of 2026 World Cup After Surgery
stories.desc: Real Madrid defender Eder Militao's 2026 World Cup dream is over following confirmation of a devastating thigh injury that required immediate surgery, with recovery not expected until October at the earliest.

stories.title: World Cup 2026 Drives Uneven Tourism Demand Across Host Nations
stories.desc: FIFA World Cup 2026 is reshaping tourism across the US, Canada, and Mexico, with rising demand, soaring hotel prices, and connectivity gaps defining the race to attract visitors.
